creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

I can’t think of a better way to cool down this summer in Florida! Be sure to check them out at📍6202 US-301, Ellenton, Florida, 34222

#ellentonflorida #bradentonflorida #dessert #summerbreak #shavedsnow

transcription.text: I can't think of a better way to cool down in Florida than with snow. Welcome to Vampire Penguin, a shade snow dessert shop in Ellington, Florida. I got a sneak peek into this adorable dessert shop, so come check it out with me. First off, how cute is this place? I love the bright sunny interior with marine life from the floor to the ceiling. This is a super kid-friendly shop too. One thing I found fascinating was the snows don't melt quickly. The owners told me they last for close to 45 minutes, plenty of time to relax and enjoy. I got to try a few of their specialty snows. This was the Death by Chocolate Snow. Oh my god, yum. If you're a chocoholic, this is definitely for you. Then I tried the Vampire Penguin Breath Snow, definitely my favorite, and if you love mint and chocolate, you're going to love this one. And then the Dirt and Worms Snow, complete with gummy worms, candy rocks, and chocolate dirt. This would be a kid's dream. There are lactose and gluten-free options, and if you're looking for a healthier dessert, these snows only have 100 calories, minus the toppings. Vampire Penguin is located in North River Village in Ellington and opens 7 days a week from 12 to 9 and 12 to 6 on Sundays. Go check them out the next time you're in Ellington.
